ddls:
CREATE TABLE "satellite_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Brightness value of the data point */,
  "scan" REAL /* Scan value of the data point */,
  "track" REAL /* Track value of the data point */,
  "acq_date" TEXT /* Date the data was acquired */,
  "acq_time" TEXT /* Time the data was acquired */,
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite source of the data */,
  "confidence" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the data point */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the data point */,
  "bright_t31" REAL /* Brightness temperature (T31) of the data point */,
  "frp" REAL /* Fire Radiative Power (FRP) of the data point */,
  "daynight" TEXT /* Day or night indicator for the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_satellite_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_id") REFERENCES satellites ("satellite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_satellite_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "satellites" (
  "satellite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each satellite */,
  "satellite_name" TEXT /* Name of the satellite */,
  "satellite_type" TEXT /* Type of the satellite */,
  "orbit_type" TEXT /* Type of orbit */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the satellite */,
  "end_of_life_date" TEXT /* Expected end of life date of the satellite */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Data format used by the satellite */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("satellite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "version_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, emergency responder) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "satellite_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_satellite_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_data_id") REFERENCES satellite_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_events" (
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire event */,
  "satellite_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the satellite data used to detect the fire */,
  "fire_date" TEXT /* Date the fire was detected */,
  "fire_time" TEXT /* Time the fire was detected */,
  "fire_location" TEXT /* Location of the fire */,
  "fire_size" REAL /* Size of the fire in acres */,
  "fire_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the fire */,
  "fire_cause" TEXT /* Suspected cause of the fire */,
  "fire_status" TEXT /* Current status of the fire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_events_satellite_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("satellite_data_id") REFERENCES satellite_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_event_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire event being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_event_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_event_updates_fire_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_id") REFERENCES fire_events ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_event_containment" (
  "containment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each containment record */,
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire event being contained */,
  "containment_date" TEXT /* Date the containment was updated */,
  "containment_time" TEXT /* Time the containment was updated */,
  "containment_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the fire contained */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for containment */,
  "resources_used" TEXT /* Resources used for containment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("containment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_event_containment_fire_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_id") REFERENCES fire_events ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_event_suppression" (
  "suppression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suppression record */,
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire event being suppressed */,
  "suppression_date" TEXT /* Date the suppression was performed */,
  "suppression_time" TEXT /* Time the suppression was performed */,
  "suppression_method" TEXT /* Method used to suppress the fire */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for suppression */,
  "resources_used" TEXT /* Resources used for suppression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suppression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_event_suppression_fire_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_id") REFERENCES fire_events ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "fire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fire event being notified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_fire_id FOREIGN KEY ("fire_id") REFERENCES fire_events ("fire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., fire events, updates) */,
  "preference" TEXT /* User preference for the notification type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preference is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the preference was created */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Time the preference was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification the message belongs to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message */,
  "message_delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the message was delivered */,
  "message_delivery_time" TEXT /* Time the message was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_messages_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)
